name: Maze Runner Ball
description: Maze Runner Ball is an exciting puzzle maze game where you control a ball to find the way out of challenging mazes. Roll the ball skillfully, avoid traps, and choose the correct direction to reach the finish line as quickly as possible. Each level features a uniquely designed maze with increasing difficulty, requiring quick reflexes and logical thinking. The gameplay is simple yet highly addictive, perfect for entertainment anytime!
